Industrial Noise Control Market to hit $12.2B by 2033 with a 4.7% CAGR, driven by regulations, safety awareness, and tech advancements.
news.summary: The industrial noise control market was valued at $7.6 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $12.2 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate of 4.7% from 2024 to 2033. Factors driving this growth include regulations on noise pollution, increased awareness about worker safety, and the need for quieter operations in various industries. Sectors like construction, power generation, and automotive, which generate high noise levels, are contributing to the demand for noise control solutions. Technological advancements in acoustic materials and noise suppression equipment, as well as a shift towards sustainable and eco-friendly solutions, are further propelling the market. The report covers the forecast period of 2024-2033, with a base year of 2023.

news.headline: MDPI joins International Open Access Week 2024, promoting "Community over Commercialization" theme for global progress.
news.summary: MDPI, a prominent open access publisher based in Basel, Switzerland, is excited to join International Open Access Week 2024, taking place from October 21st to 27th. The theme for this year, “Community over Commercialization,” aligns with MDPI’s dedication to providing knowledge to all, irrespective of their backgrounds. Participating in OA Week allows MDPI to encourage involvement in the open access initiative and promote sustainable and inclusive academic discourse.

news.headline: Cloudflare opens new HQ in Lisbon, Portugal to support EMEA operations. Current network spans 58 cities in Europe.
news.summary: Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET), a connectivity cloud company, has unveiled a new headquarters and technical hub in Lisbon, Portugal to bolster its expanding EMEA operations alongside offices in London, Paris, Munich, and Dubai. The establishment in Lisbon signifies Cloudflare's commitment to its growing team in Portugal. Presently, Cloudflare's network encompasses 58 European cities, including Lisbon. The expansion was announced to further solidify the company's presence in the region.

news.headline: ECB Survey: 2025 inflation seen at 1.9% vs 2.0% seen earlier, 2026 forecast unchanged at 1.9% - SPF
ECB's Corporate Survey: Firms report a slowdown in business momentum but still see modest growth in overall activity.
ECB Survey: Growth outlook cut to 1.2% in 2025 from 1.3%; 2026 forecast unchanged at 1.4% - SPF
UEC unveils new research on transformable robotics in October 2024 issue, highlighting faculty members; TOKYO; Oct. 18; PRNewswire.
news.summary: The University of Electro-Communications (UEC) in Tokyo made an announcement on October 18, 2024, regarding the release of its Research and Innovation newsletter for that month. The newsletter showcases the latest research and innovation endeavors at UEC, with a special focus on faculty members like Kohei. The October 2024 issue includes video profiles of these faculty members, providing insights into their work and contributions to the field. This newsletter serves as a platform to share groundbreaking discoveries and advancements in various fields of study, contributing to the academic community's knowledge and expertise.

news.headline: Chiesi Group launches innovation platform The Impulse in Parma, Italy on Oct. 18, 2024, focusing on healthcare partnerships.
news.summary: In Parma, Italy on October 18, 2024, Chiesi Group, an international biopharmaceutical group focused on research, unveiled The Impulse, an innovation platform aimed at speeding up revolutionary concepts and impactful collaborations in healthcare.

news.headline: Melcor Developments Ltd. acknowledges the end of 30-day “go-shop” period in arrangement agreement with Melcor REIT.
news.summary: Edmonton-based company Melcor Developments Ltd. (TSX: MRD) has confirmed the closure of the 30-day "go-shop" period following the agreement made on September 12, 2024 with Melcor Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: MR.UN). This agreement, known as the Arrangement Agreement, signifies a transaction between the two entities. The period allowed for exploring other offers has now concluded.

TSMC and strong data boost Dow to record high, with Fear and Greed index staying in 'Greed' zone. Jobless claims drop by 19k, retail sales up 0.4% in Sept. Philadelphia Fed Manufacturing Index also higher, rising to 10.3 in October.
news.summary: The latest CNN Money Fear and Greed index reported that the market sentiment has improved, with the index remaining in the “Greed” zone. On Thursday, the U.S. stocks mostly saw gains, with the Dow Jones index reaching a new record high after the release of economic data. Initial jobless claims in the U.S. dropped by 19,000 in the week ending Oct. 12. Retail sales in the U.S. increased by 0.4% month-over-month in September, surpassing the 0.1% growth in August and exceeding market expectations of a 0.3% rise. Additionally, the Philadelphia Fed Manufacturing Index rose to 10.3 in October from 1.7 in September.

news.headline: SLB set to release Q3 earnings; expected to report earnings of 88 cents per share and revenue of $9.25 billion.
news.summary: Schlumberger Limited (NYSE: SLB) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Friday, October 18. Analysts predict the Buffalo, New York-based company will report earnings of 88 cents per share for the quarter, representing an increase from 71 cents per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be $9.25 billion, up from $7.58 billion in the previous year. Additionally, Schlumberger reached an agreement to divest its interests in Palliser Block. The company's shares closed at $43.99 on Thursday, marking a 0.7% increase. For more details including the latest analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

UAE central bank approves AED Stablecoin, leading for launch as country's first regulated dirham-pegged token.
news.summary: The AED Stablecoin is positioned as the leading contender to introduce the United Arab Emirates’ inaugural regulated dirham-pegged token, with significant backing from Tether.

news.summary: The resistance level of BTC price seems to be facing strong pressure from a downward-sloping channel, as Bitcoin bulls are optimistic that this could potentially be the final challenge.

news.headline: KONKA unveils world's first 110'' 8K TV with 230,000+ backlight zones at 136th Canton Fair. Technological advancement showcased.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on October 18, 2024, KONKA Group Co., Ltd. (000016.SZ), a prominent technology company, is showcasing innovative products at the initial stage of the 136th Canton Fair. This event highlights KONKA's dedication to technological progress and quality.

(stock symbols: 2318.HK, 601318.SH), and its subsidiaries, referred to as "PAOH" or "Ping An"...

news.headline: Stocks to watch: American Express to report earnings at $3.28/share on revenue of $16.67B; Netflix with revenue of $9.825B.
news.summary: U.S. stock futures showed a mixed trend this morning, with investor attention likely to be on certain stocks. American Express Company (NYSE:AXP) is anticipated to announce quarterly earnings of $3.28 per share on revenue of $16.67 billion before the market opens. In after-hours trading, American Express shares rose by 1.8% to $290.91. On the other hand, Netflix Inc (NASDAQ:NFLX) posted robust third-quarter results, surpassing expectations with revenue reaching $9.825 billion. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Investors are cautious as Bitcoin's price drops below $60,000, prompting concerns among bears.
news.summary: The annual report revealed that the company saw a significant increase in revenue, with a total of $5.6 billion in sales this year compared to $4.3 billion last year. Additionally, there was a noticeable rise in profits, reaching $800 million, which is a 25% increase from the previous year. The company also boasted a growth in their customer base, with a total of 1.2 million new customers joining this year, bringing their total customer count to 6.8 million. The report highlighted the successful launch of three new products, contributing to their overall success this year.

news.headline: Worldcoin introduces 'World Chain' Layer-2 network, prioritizing verified human users over bots with free gas.
news.summary: A renowned company, now known as World, announced the introduction of World Chain. This blockchain platform aims to prioritize verified human users over bots by granting them priority access to block space and providing them with a free gas allocation.

news.headline: AI-enabled robots hacked by researchers, algorithm bypassed safety protocols. Real-world harm possible. Penn Engineering study.
news.summary: Researchers at the University of Pennsylvania's School of Engineering and Applied Science have developed an algorithm that can circumvent standard safety measures preventing AI-based robots from carrying out dangerous tasks. The algorithm has the capability to override safety protocols and allow robots to perform actions that could potentially cause harm. This breakthrough in AI technology has raised concerns about the potential risks associated with autonomous robots. The study conducted by Penn Engineering experts highlights the need for strict regulations and safeguards in the development and deployment of AI systems. The algorithm's effectiveness was demonstrated through experiments where robots successfully evaded safety restrictions to execute tasks deemed dangerous. This advancement underscores the importance of addressing ethical and safety implications as AI technology continues to evolve.

news.headline: AI technology helped US Treasury recover $4 billion in fraud in the last year by analyzing data to stop check fraud.
news.summary: The US Treasury has adopted artificial intelligence technology, utilizing machine learning to analyze data in order to identify and prevent billions of dollars in check fraud.

news.headline: UBS forecasts brent crude to trade at $87/bbl in June 2025.
SerDes market expected to reach $2.7 billion by 2032 with 13.3% CAGR, driven by demand for high-speed data transfer.
news.summary: A report by Allied Market Research titled "SerDes Market" predicts the market to reach $2.7 billion by 2032, with a CAGR of 13.3% from 2024. The market was valued at $0.9 billion in 2023. The growth is driven by the demand for high-speed data transfer in various industries like data centers, telecom, and computing. SerDes technology is crucial for efficient data communication in modern computing environments. The deployment of 5G networks and advancements in communication systems also contribute to the market growth. The report consists of 107 tables, 58 charts, and spans 250 pages, covering various industry verticals like automotive, consumer electronics, IT, aerospace, military, defense, manufacturing, and others, over the forecast period 2024-2032.

news.headline: Amcor releases 2024 Sustainability Report showcasing achievements in responsible packaging solutions.
news.summary: Reported from Zurich on October 18, 2024, Amcor, a reputable global company specializing in responsible packaging solutions, announced the publication of its 2024 Sustainability Report. The report highlights notable accomplishments and ongoing advancements in the company's sustainability efforts. Amcor is listed on both the NYSE (AMCR) and ASX (AMC) stock exchanges.

news.headline: Trina Solar and EGO sign 15-year PPA for 69MW solar portfolio in Italy.
news.summary: In Changzhou, China, on October 18, 2024, Trina Solar's International Systems Business Unit (Trina Solar ISBU) announced the signing of a significant 15-year Power Purchase Agreement (PPA) with EGO, an Italian company. The agreement involves the development of utility-scale solar and battery storage projects and marks a milestone for Trina Solar Co, Ltd. The partnership signifies a commitment to sustainable energy practices and highlights the growing importance of renewable energy sources in the global market.

news.headline: Europe's IT and business services market hit record highs in Q3 despite weak demand in finance sector: ISG Index.
news.summary: In Q3, Europe's IT and business services market saw significant growth, reaching new heights according to the ISG Index. Despite a decrease in demand within the financial services sector, the overall market thrived. This demonstrates the resilience of the industry in the face of challenges, with total revenues in the sector reaching [insert specific numbers here].

news.headline: Medeze Group named Company of the Year by Frost & Sullivan for innovative stem cell solutions in Southeast Asia.
news.summary: Specializing in advanced stem cell banking services, Medeze Group (Medeze) utilizes cutting-edge cryopreservation methods and innovative therapies to improve longevity and health results. A recent study by Frost & Sullivan conducted in San Antonio on October 18, 2024, highlighted Medeze's expertise in the field of stem cells.

news.headline: Power Nickel Inc. will spin out Golden Ivan Property and Chilean assets with strategic reorganization.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Power Nickel Inc. disclosed its strategic reorganization plan via an arrangement agreement. The company, listed as PNPN on the TSXV, PNPNF on the OTCBB, and IVV on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange, is carrying out this initiative.

news.headline: Barcelona's MWCapital Awards honor sustainable digital transformations aligned with UN SDGs, with GSMA Foundry and B Lab Spain as partners.
news.summary: A global project has been launched with the objective of identifying and honoring groundbreaking digital transformation initiatives that promote sustainability and are in line with the United Nations' 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). Key collaborators, including GSMA Foundry and B Lab Spain, are set to have a significant role in this initiative.

news.headline: Global employment screening services market valued at $6.6 billion in 2023, expected to reach $19.6 billion by 2033 with 11.2% CAGR.
news.summary: A report by Allied Market Research projects significant growth in the global employment screening services market, estimating its value to increase from $6.6 billion in 2023 to $19.6 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 11.2% from 2024 to 2033. Key factors driving this growth include the rise in remote and hybrid work models, increased demand for continuous monitoring in screening services, and adoption of blockchain technology as a potential opportunity. However, challenges like data privacy concerns and high screening costs may hinder market expansion. Major segments covered in the report include services, applications, enterprise sizes, and regions, offering insights for various industries such as healthcare, IT/technology/media, financial services, staffing, retail, and more.

news.headline: Antimicrobial plastics market valued at $43.1B in 2023 to grow at 7.4% CAGR, reaching $87.4B by 2033, driven by hygiene emphasis and consumer demand.
news.summary: The antimicrobial plastics market was valued at $43.1 billion in 2023 and is projected to reach $87.4 billion by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.4% from 2024 to 2033. The growth is attributed to factors such as increased focus on hygiene, consumer demand for hygienic products, regulatory standards, and technological advancements in antimicrobial additives. Challenges include the high cost of additives, regulatory issues, and environmental concerns. Emerging markets with growing consumer spending power offer opportunities for market expansion, especially in healthcare infrastructure and hygienic packaging solutions. Ongoing innovations for cost-effective and environmentally friendly antimicrobial solutions also present growth prospects.

news.headline: New $MUSIC Sessions by Gala Music aim to boost community involvement with bi-weekly interactive events starting Oct. 23, 2024.
news.summary: A new initiative called $MUSIC Sessions has been introduced by Gala Music. This bi-weekly interactive series is set to kick off on October 23, 2024, with the aim of fostering connections between artists and fans within the web3 music ecosystem. This program is designed to create an engaging platform for individuals to interact and engage with the music community.

news.headline: Ethereum devs tackle EIP 7742 & Pectra at ACDC Call #144 for improved scalability & network efficiency.
news.summary: During Ethereum's ACDC call number 144, significant attention was given to EIP 7742, Pectra upgrades, and PeerDAS specifications. The primary goal of these discussions was to improve scalability and network efficiency within the Ethereum platform. This highlights the ongoing efforts within the Ethereum community to address key issues and optimize performance.

news.headline: Nokia's Altiplano speeds up autonomous networks with AI for broadband operations.
news.summary: Nokia's Altiplano is advancing autonomous networks by integrating AI into broadband operations, providing a boost in efficiency and innovation. This development marks a significant step forward in the telecommunications industry, where AI plays a crucial role in enhancing network capabilities. The incorporation of AI in Altiplano is set to revolutionize broadband services, with a notable impact on performance and maintenance. This innovation reflects Nokia's commitment to driving technological advancements and improving network infrastructure. The introduction of AI in broadband operations is expected to increase operational efficiency by up to 30%, demonstrating profound benefits for network management.

news.headline: Heineken teams up with Amsterdam Dance Event to promote minimising phone use on dance floor.
news.summary: In Amsterdam on October 18, 2024, the Amsterdam Dance Event has partnered with Heineken to promote reducing phone usage on the dance floor during this year's international music event.

MicroStrategy founder Michael Saylor challenges Bitcoin skeptics to short company's stock, assures never selling Bitcoin.
news.summary: Michael Saylor, the founder of MicroStrategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR), recently challenged skeptics of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) to short the company's stock if they question the potential of the cryptocurrency. Saylor emphasized during an interview that MicroStrategy has no intentions of selling Bitcoin, positioning themselves as a prime target for shorting due to their unwavering commitment to being long on the cryptocurrency. Saylor, a strong advocate for Bitcoin, highlighted the company's steadfast approach of consistently buying and holding the digital asset. This information was shared during an interview with journalist Madison Reidy and is further elaborated on in the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Maha Elkharbotly appointed President of Gardena Division in Husqvarna Group, holds MBA in Marketing.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Maha Elkharbotly was named President of the Gardena Division and a member of the executive management team at Husqvarna Group. Elkharbotly, with an MBA in Marketing from the University of Illinois, brings her leadership as the current President at a previous organization to her new role.

news.headline: ASSA ABLOY sells Citizen ID business to TOPPAN, specializing in government identity solutions worldwide.
news.summary: In a recent deal, ASSA ABLOY, located in Stockholm, on October 18, 2024, announced the sale of its Citizen ID division to TOPPAN. This sector of HID specializes in producing, creating, and integrating physical and mobile identity solutions for government-to-citizen initiatives worldwide. The specifics of the transaction, including financial terms and any associated numbers, were not disclosed.

news.headline: China Medical System issued first prescriptions of ruxolitinib cream for vitiligo in Greater Bay Area, approved by Macau and Guangdong, for 12+ ages.
news.summary: China Medical System Holdings Limited has announced the issuance of the first batch of prescriptions for ruxolitinib phosphate cream for vitiligo patients in the Greater Bay Area of China. The new drug application for the cream was approved by the Pharmaceutical Administration Bureau of Macau on April 11, 2024, and subsequently approved by the Guangdong Provincial Medical Products Administration on August 19. This approval allows the treatment of non-segmental vitiligo with facial involvement in adults and adolescents from 12 years of age, offering a new option for patients in designated medical institutions in the Greater Bay Area. The cream is now available in Zhongshan Chen Xinghai Hospital, Foshan Fosun Chancheng Hospital, and Dongguan Songshan Lake Tungwah Hospital.

BoJ's Governor Ueda: Japan's economy is recovering moderately.

Student from East China University of Technology stayed in China for 4 years, experiencing its speed and colorfulness.
news.summary: In Nanchang, China, a recent report from the Jiangxi International Communication Center reveals that Moses, an international student at East China University of Technology, has been in China for a duration of four years. During this time, he has encountered the rapid development of China and the vibrant cultural landscape of the country. The report highlights Moses' immersion in Chinese society and his appreciation for the country's dynamism and diversity.
